talents.name: Golden Blade's Petaled Touch
talents.desc:
**Normal Attack**
Performs up to 4 rapid strikes.

**Charged Attack**
Consumes a certain amount of Stamina to unleash 2 rapid sword strikes.

**Plunging Attack**
Plunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact.

talents.name: Heaven and Earth Made Manifest
talents.desc:
Summoning a shadow of her former powers, she switches to the **Lunar Phase Shift** mode.
In this mode, Zibai's Normal Attacks and Charged Attacks will deal **Geo DMG** that cannot be overridden by other infusions, and she can accrue special **Phase Shift Radiance** through different methods. Zibai can consume Phase Shift Radiance to unleash the special Elemental Skill **Spirit Steed's Stride**.

**Moonsign: Ascendant Gleam**
While in the **Lunar Phase Shift** mode, when Zibai performs Normal Attacks, the fourth attack will deal an additional instance of **Geo DMG**, which is considered Lunar-Crystallize Reaction DMG.
[Details title="Lunar Phase Shift"]After using the Elemental Skill **Heaven and Earth Made Manifest**, Zibai will change to this mode. This mode lasts at most 15s and has the following properties:
· Normal and Charged Attacks are converted into **Geo DMG** that cannot be overridden by other infusions.
· The Elemental Skill **Heaven and Earth Made Manifest** will also be converted to the Elemental Skill **Spirit Steed's Stride**: When Zibai has at least 70 **Phase Shift Radiance**, she can consume 70 Phase Shift Radiance to unleash Spirit Steed's Stride and cause two instances of **Geo DMG**. The second instance will be considered Lunar-Crystallize Reaction DMG.

A maximum of 100 **Phase Shift Radiance** points can be accrued, and Zibai can accumulate them in the following ways:
· She gains 10 points every second she is in the **Lunar Phase Shift** mode.
· She gains 5 points when hitting an opponent with her Normal Attacks. She can gain Phase Shift Radiance points in this way once every 0.5s.

**Moonsign: Ascendant Gleam**
When nearby party members trigger Lunar-Crystallize, they will also accrue 35 **Phase Shift Radiance** points for Zibai. Points can be gained this way once every 4s. Unleashing the special elemental skill **Spirit Steed's Stride** will reset the CD for **Phase Shift Radiance** gained this way.

Zibai will leave this mode after unleashing **Spirit Steed's Stride** 4 times, or when the skill's duration ends.[/Details]

talentTable.name: Lunar Phase Shift Charged Attack DMG

ult.name: Tri-Sphere Eminence
ult.desc:
Zibai operates the Jadelight Canopy, dealing two instances of **Geo DMG**, with the second damage instance being considered Lunar-Crystallize Reaction DMG.
When cast, if Zibai is in the **Lunar Phase Shift**, the duration of the current Lunar Phase Shift will extend by an additional 1.7s.
[Details title="Lunar Phase Shift"]After using the Elemental Skill **Heaven and Earth Made Manifest**, Zibai will change to this mode. This mode lasts at most 15s and has the following properties:
· Normal and Charged Attacks are converted into **Geo DMG** that cannot be overridden by other infusions.
· The Elemental Skill **Heaven and Earth Made Manifest** will also be converted to the Elemental Skill **Spirit Steed's Stride**: When Zibai has at least 70 **Phase Shift Radiance**, she can consume 70 Phase Shift Radiance to unleash Spirit Steed's Stride and cause two instances of **Geo DMG**. The second instance will be considered Lunar-Crystallize Reaction DMG.

A maximum of 100 **Phase Shift Radiance** points can be accrued, and Zibai can accumulate them in the following ways:
· She gains 10 points every second she is in the **Lunar Phase Shift** mode.
· She gains 5 points when hitting an opponent with her Normal Attacks. She can gain Phase Shift Radiance points in this way once every 0.5s.

**Moonsign: Ascendant Gleam**
When nearby party members trigger Lunar-Crystallize, they will also accrue 35 **Phase Shift Radiance** points for Zibai. Points can be gained this way once every 4s. Unleashing the special elemental skill **Spirit Steed's Stride** will reset the CD for **Phase Shift Radiance** gained this way.

Zibai will leave this mode after unleashing **Spirit Steed's Stride** 4 times, or when the skill's duration ends.[/Details]

passive.name: The Selenic Adeptus Descends
passive.desc:
When casting the Elemental Skill **Heaven and Earth Made Manifest**, or when nearby party members trigger Moondrift Harmony, Zibai gains the **Selenic Descent** effect for 4s: The DMG dealt by the 2nd hit of **Spirit Steed's Stride** is increased by 60% of Zibai's DEF.

passive.name: Layered Peaks Pierce the Clouds
passive.desc: Other **Geo** party members increase Zibai's DEF by 15% each. **Hydro** party members increase her Elemental Mastery by 60 each.

passive.name: Moonsign Benediction: The Coursing Sun and Moon
passive.desc:
When a party member triggers a Hydro Crystallize reaction, it will be converted into the Lunar-Crystallize reaction, with every 100 DEF that Zibai has increasing Lunar-Crystallize's Base DMG by 0.7%, up to a maximum of 14%.

Additionally, when Zibai is in the party, the party's **Moonsign** will increase by 1 level.

passive.name: Moonlit Flower Forest
passive.desc:
At night (18:00 – 06:00), when not in combat, restore 1 Elemental Energy to Zibai every 2 seconds.
This effect does not work in Domains, Trounce Domains, or the Spiral Abyss.

constellations.name: Burst Forth With Vigor, But Enter in Silence
constellations.desc:
After using the Elemental Skill **Heaven and Earth Made Manifest**, Zibai will immediately gain 100 **Phase Shift Radiance**, and the max number of **Spirit Steed's Stride** usages per **Lunar Phase Shift** mode is increased to 5 times.
Additionally, each time you switch to the Lunar Phase Shift mode, the first Spirit Steed's Stride's 2nd-hit Lunar-Crystallize Reaction DMG is increased by 220%.
[Details title="Heaven and Earth Made Manifest"]Summoning a shadow of her former powers, she switches to the **Lunar Phase Shift** mode.

constellations.name: At Birth Are Souls Born, and in Death Leave But Husks
constellations.desc:
When in the **Lunar Phase Shift** mode, all nearby party members' Lunar-Crystallize Reaction DMG is increased by 30%.

**Moonsign: Ascendant Gleam**: Ascension Talent **The Selenic Adeptus Descends** is enhanced: the DMG dealt by the 2nd hit of **Spirit Steed's Stride** is further increased by 550% of Zibai's DEF. You must first unlock the Ascension Talent "The Selenic Adeptus Descends."

constellations.name: Free From Constraints and Worldly Ties
constellations.desc:
Increases the Level of Elemental Skill **Heaven and Earth Made Manifest** by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
[Details title="Heaven and Earth Made Manifest"]Summoning a shadow of her former powers, she switches to the **Lunar Phase Shift** mode.
In this mode, Zibai's Normal Attacks and Charged Attacks will deal **Geo DMG** that cannot be overridden by other infusions, and she can accrue special **Phase Shift Radiance** through different methods. constellations.name: The Spirit Passes, Then Form Follows
constellations.desc:
While in the **Lunar Phase Shift** mode, Zibai's Normal Attack sequence will not reset, and when **Spirit Steed's Stride** hits opponents, Zibai will gain the **"Scattermoon Splendor"** effect: The next time she uses Normal Attacks, the additional attack from her 4th hit will deal 250% of the original damage as Lunar-Crystallize Reaction DMG.
[Details title="Lunar Phase Shift"]After using the Elemental Skill **Heaven and Earth Made Manifest**, Zibai will change to this mode. This mode lasts at most 15s and has the following properties:
· Normal and Charged Attacks are converted into **Geo DMG** that cannot be overridden by other infusions.
· The Elemental Skill **Heaven and Earth Made Manifest** will also be converted to the Elemental Skill **Spirit Steed's Stride**: When Zibai has at least 70 **Phase Shift Radiance**, she can consume 70 Phase Shift Radiance to unleash Spirit Steed's Stride and cause two instances of **Geo DMG**. The second instance will be considered Lunar-Crystallize Reaction DMG.

A maximum of 100 **Phase Shift Radiance** points can be accrued, and Zibai can accumulate them in the following ways:
· She gains 10 points every second she is in the **Lunar Phase Shift** mode.
· She gains 5 points when hitting an opponent with her Normal Attacks. She can gain Phase Shift Radiance points in this way once every 0.5s.

**Moonsign: Ascendant Gleam**
When nearby party members trigger Lunar-Crystallize, they will also accrue 35 **Phase Shift Radiance** points for Zibai. Points can be gained this way once every 4s. Unleashing the special elemental skill **Spirit Steed's Stride** will reset the CD for **Phase Shift Radiance** gained this way.

Zibai will leave this mode after unleashing **Spirit Steed's Stride** 4 times, or when the skill's duration ends.[/Details]

constellations.name: Perceive the Worthless and Debate It Not
constellations.desc:
Increases the Level of **Tri-Sphere Eminence** by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
[Details title="Tri-Sphere Eminence"]Zibai operates the Jadelight Canopy, dealing two instances of **Geo DMG**, with the second damage instance being considered Lunar-Crystallize Reaction DMG.
When cast, if Zibai is in the **Lunar Phase Shift**, the duration of the current Lunar Phase Shift will extend by an additional 1.7s.[/Details]

constellations.name: The World, A Journey in Passing
constellations.desc:
While Zibai is in the **Lunar Phase Shift** mode, her **Phase Shift Radiance** gain rate is increased by 50%.
Additionally, **Spirit Steed's Stride** will change such that it will consume all Phase Shift Radiance. This will **elevate** the DMG dealt by this instance of Spirit Steed's Stride and the Lunar-Crystallize Reaction DMG dealt by Zibai within the next 3s by 1.6% for every point consumed above 70. This effect cannot stack.
[Details title="Lunar Phase Shift"]After using the Elemental Skill **Heaven and Earth Made Manifest**, Zibai will change to this mode. This mode lasts at most 15s and has the following properties:
· Normal and Charged Attacks are converted into **Geo DMG** that cannot be overridden by other infusions.
· The Elemental Skill **Heaven and Earth Made Manifest** will also be converted to the Elemental Skill **Spirit Steed's Stride**: When Zibai has at least 70 **Phase Shift Radiance**, she can consume 70 Phase Shift Radiance to unleash Spirit Steed's Stride and cause two instances of **Geo DMG**. The second instance will be considered Lunar-Crystallize Reaction DMG.

A maximum of 100 **Phase Shift Radiance** points can be accrued, and Zibai can accumulate them in the following ways:
· She gains 10 points every second she is in the **Lunar Phase Shift** mode.
· She gains 5 points when hitting an opponent with her Normal Attacks. She can gain Phase Shift Radiance points in this way once every 0.5s.

**Moonsign: Ascendant Gleam**
When nearby party members trigger Lunar-Crystallize, they will also accrue 35 **Phase Shift Radiance** points for Zibai. Points can be gained this way once every 4s. Unleashing the special elemental skill **Spirit Steed's Stride** will reset the CD for **Phase Shift Radiance** gained this way.

Zibai will leave this mode after unleashing **Spirit Steed's Stride** 4 times, or when the skill's duration ends.[/Details]
[Details title="Elevation"]Special DMG Boost effect. It is calculated independently of other DMG Boost effects.[/Details]
